title: Eva 30 Release Date Guessing Game
wikitext:
[]: Eva 3.0 Release Date Guessing Game!             Quote Post by cd603 » Mon Aug 29, 2011 3:12 am It's pretty simple: *Put down a date (sometime between July and November) *No one can have same date (So check often) *Winner gets the best bragging rights around! BEGIN!!!! My date is: Friday, September 21, 2012

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Mon Aug 29, 2011 6:58 am A fall month by either the 25-26th of the month 2012.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Aug 29, 2011 10:00 am Before people place thier bets they should know that in Japan the theatre dates are usually saturdays, not fridays. I'm gonna bet on March 2nd, 2013 because it's gonna get delaaaaaaaaaaaaayed

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Aug 29, 2011 10:08 am I'm pretty damn certain this is going to be an August release. But to play it safe & stick in the Autumn season I'll say October 13, 2012

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Mon Aug 29, 2011 11:57 am 2041 Septemer 26th

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Mon Aug 29, 2011 12:39 pm cd603 wrote: (sometime between July and November)

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Aug 29, 2011 12:42 pm September 22, 2012. The day of the autumnal equinox, which is a public holiday in Japan. I don't know, seems stylish.

[]:             Quote Post by Sephizim » Mon Aug 29, 2011 1:56 pm I'll go with September 29th 2012. Why not?

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Mon Aug 29, 2011 2:09 pm JoeD80 wrote: Doesn't fall technically end in December? December 15th, 2012

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Mon Aug 29, 2011 3:07 pm September 12, 2012: the canonical date of SI if I remember correctly.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Aug 29, 2011 9:47 pm Trajan wrote: September 12, 2012: the canonical date of SI if I remember correctly.

[]:             Quote Post by John » Mon Aug 29, 2011 9:51 pm September 15, 2012.

[]:             Quote Post by Viking » Tue Aug 30, 2011 9:36 am John wrote: September 15, 2011.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Tue Aug 30, 2011 12:24 pm I guess October 30 2012

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Aug 30, 2011 12:24 pm Stryker 's post was rule-breaking since it didn't specify a month. Viking : You typoed as well, don't you mean 2012 and not 2011? So, since a lot of release dates involving 2.0 (some with 1.0) revolved around the dates 25, 26, 27 (lol Shinji's Sdat) I'm going to loosely follow 2.0's pattern: September 27, 2012 for 3.0/Q's theatrical release date. As an aside, that means the DVD/BD release would be May 26, 2013 (or May 27 ala 1.11's (in 2009) DVD/BD release date) . Not surprising, but sigh. While 3.0's theatrical release could land on September 1st (just like with 1.0 in 2007), I personally don't see that happening for various reasons; I think they'd continue the 25/26/27 release date scheme for both Q/3.0 and Final/?.

[]:             Quote Post by Viking » Tue Aug 30, 2011 12:43 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: [..] Viking : You typoed as well, don't you mean 2012 and not 2011? [..]

[]:             Quote Post by Apjak » Tue Aug 30, 2011 1:51 pm August 26, 2012

[]:             Quote Post by kyubei » Tue Aug 30, 2011 3:58 pm October 6. And then Anno will come and say " Lol sorry we lost the movie!1 "

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Tue Aug 30, 2011 6:48 pm April 1st 2012 Then when everyone goes to see the movie, a giant head of Anno appears: APRIL FOOLS It's really 2016.

[]:             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Tue Aug 30, 2011 11:28 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: So, since a lot of release dates involving 2.0 (some with 1.0) revolved around the dates 25, 26, 27 (lol Shinji's Sdat) I'm going to loosely follow 2.0's pattern: September 27, 2012 for 3.0/Q's theatrical release date. As an aside, that means the DVD/BD release would be May 26, 2013 (or May 27 ala 1.11's (in 2009) DVD/BD release date) . Not surprising, but sigh. While 3.0's theatrical release could land on September 1st (just like with 1.0 in 2007), I personally don't see that happening for various reasons; I think they'd continue the 25/26/27 release date scheme for both Q/3.0 and Final/?.
